{{CargoRelic
|name=Parnell's Asphalt Drip
|class_id=22517
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|birthday=07-11
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On Jul 11, 2013 AD, humans captured the moment when a drop of asphalt dripped in the asphalt drop experiment for the first time.<br>To prove to his students that some seemingly solid substances were actually highly viscous liquids, Professor Parnell placed a sample of asphalt in a sealed funnel and opened it three years later, causing the pitch to flow. However, it was not until 69 years later that people finally recorded the moment when a drop of pitch dripped. Today, this is the world's longest-running experiment, and the pitch inside can still allow this experiment to continue for hundreds of years.
|fame=71
|art=43
|fth=35
|civ=49
|tech=45
|ss1=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 3%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail ATK +3<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F
|ss2=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 4%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail ATK +4<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F
|ss3=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 5%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail ATK +5<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F
|ss4=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 7%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail ATK +7<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F
|ss5=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 9%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail ATK +9<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F
|ss7=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 9%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail ATK +9<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F<br>Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 7% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Frostsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: This Relic's FAME +10
|skill2=[[File:Frostsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: Frost Sanctum, Glorium Cap +15%
}}
